case_title: MAIL BOXES ETC. VS PUCILLO, RONALD et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $535.00 FILED BY MAIL BOXES ETC. AS TO DEFENDANT PUCILLO, RONALD PLATINUM FILMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
CERT. RECEIPT TO MAIL BOXES ETC. RETURNED SIGNED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAIL BOXES ETC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PLATINUM FILMS $535.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $555.00, DISM AS TO RONALD PUCILLO. SERVICE AS TO PLATINUM FILMS RULED VALID. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
